description: Items from uncommon_magic_items bucket — open-compatible metadata and original summaries.

items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
items.description_summary: Drink: regain 4d4+4 HP.

items.name: Potion of Resistance

passive_effects.summary: Resistance to one damage type for 1 hour (type specified by DM or variant).

items.description_summary: Drink: for 1 hour gain resistance to one damage type (acid/cold/fire/force/lightning/necrotic/poison/psychic/radiant/thunder).

items.name: Potion of Animal Friendship
items.description_summary: Drink: for 1 hour, cast Animal Friendship (DC 13) at will.

items.name: Potion of Growth
items.description_summary: Drink: for 1d4 hours, Enlarge effect (Large size, advantage on Str checks/saves, +1d4 damage).

items.name: Potion of Hill Giant Strength

passive_effects.summary: Strength becomes 21 for 1 hour if not already higher.

items.description_summary: Drink: for 1 hour, Strength becomes 21 (Hill Giant). No effect if Strength already higher.

items.name: Potion of Water Breathing
items.description_summary: Drink: breathe underwater for 1 hour.

granted_actions.name: Cast from Scroll
granted_actions.summary: Cast linked spell once, then consume the scroll.

granted_actions.name: Cast from Scroll
granted_actions.summary: Cast linked spell once, then consume the scroll.

items.name: Scroll of Protection

granted_actions.name: Cast from Scroll
granted_actions.summary: Cast linked spell once, then consume the scroll.

items.description_summary: Action: read aloud. 5-minute effect: protected from one creature type. Attacks from that type at disadvantage; type can't possess you.

items.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
items.description_summary: 7 charges. Expend 1–3 charges to cast Magic Missile at 1st (1 charge), 2nd (2), or 3rd level (3). Regain 1d6+1 at dawn; 1 in 20 destroyed at 0 charges.

items.name: Immovable Rod

granted_actions.name: Toggle Immovable Rod
granted_actions.summary: Press button: rod becomes immovable (fixed in space, up to 8,000 lbs force). Press again to release.

items.description_summary: Action: press button to fix rod in place (cannot be moved by up to 8,000 lbs of force until pressed again). Holds position in mid-air.

items.name: Bag of Holding

passive_effects.summary: Container: holds 500 lbs / 64 cu ft. Always weighs 15 lbs.

items.description_summary: Wondrous container. Holds 500 lbs / 64 cubic ft internally. Weighs only 15 lbs.

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind

passive_effects.summary: Advantage on Stealth checks while moving (your movement makes no sound).

items.description_summary: Your movement is silent. Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while moving.

items.name: Bracers of Archery

passive_effects.summary: +2 damage bonus with longbow and shortbow attacks while attuned.

items.description_summary: Attuned: +2 damage with longbows/shortbows; gain proficiency with longbow and shortbow.

items.name: Cloak of Elvenkind

passive_effects.summary: Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks to hide.
Disadvantage on Perception checks relying on sight to detect you.

items.description_summary: Attuned: advantage on Stealth; others have disadvantage on sight-based Perception vs you.

items.name: Cloak of Protection

passive_effects.summary: +1 bonus to all saving throws while attuned.

items.description_summary: Attuned (cloak slot): +1 AC and +1 to all saving throws.

items.name: Eyes of the Eagle

passive_effects.summary: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks relying on sight.
Can see clearly to max range without penalty.

items.description_summary: Attuned: advantage on sight-based Perception checks. Keen vision at all distances.

items.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power

passive_effects.summary: Your Strength score is 19 while attuned (if your score is not already higher).

items.description_summary: Attuned: your Strength score becomes 19 (if not already higher).

items.name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing

passive_effects.summary: Swim speed equal to walking speed, no climbing/swimming penalties.
Climb speed equal to walking speed.

items.description_summary: Attuned: swim and climb speed equal to walking speed; no Str checks to climb/swim.

items.name: Goggles of Night

passive_effects.summary: 60 ft darkvision; if already have darkvision, range increases by 60 ft.

items.description_summary: Darkvision 60 ft while worn (or +60 ft if already have darkvision).

items.name: Headband of Intellect

passive_effects.summary: Your Intelligence score is 19 while attuned (if your score is not already higher).

items.description_summary: Attuned: your Intelligence score becomes 19 (if not already higher).

granted_actions.name: Javelin of Lightning (Special Throw)
granted_actions.summary: When thrown, becomes a bolt of lightning. All creatures within 5 ft of the path (not target) make DC 13 Dex save or take 4d6 lightning damage (half on success). Returns after throwing.

items.name: Periapt of Health

passive_effects.summary: Immune to disease while wearing this periapt.

items.description_summary: Disease immunity while worn. Cures existing diseases.

items.name: Periapt of Wound Closure

passive_effects.summary: Stabilize automatically when you succeed on a death saving throw.
Double number of hit dice rolled when spending hit dice during a short rest.

items.description_summary: Attuned: auto-stabilize on death save success; double hit dice rolled on short rests.

items.name: Stone of Good Luck

passive_effects.summary: +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws while attuned.

items.description_summary: Attuned: +1 to all ability checks and saving throws.

items.name: Cap of Water Breathing

passive_effects.summary: Breathe normally underwater while wearing this cap.

items.description_summary: While worn underwater, you can breathe normally.

items.name: Circlet of Blasting

granted_actions.name: Scorching Ray
granted_actions.summary: Cast Scorching Ray: 3 rays at +5, 2d6 fire each on hit.

items.description_summary: 1 charge. Action: cast Scorching Ray (3 rays, +5 spell attack, 2d6 fire each). Regains 1 charge at dawn.

items.name: Driftglobe

granted_actions.name: Light / Dancing Lights
granted_actions.summary: Cast Light or Dancing Lights from the globe.

granted_actions.name: Continual Flame (1/day)
granted_actions.summary: Cast Continual Flame from the globe once per dawn.

items.description_summary: Action: cast Light or Dancing Lights at will. Once per dawn: cast Continual Flame. Globe hovers and follows within 60 ft.

items.name: Elemental Gem

passive_effects.summary: Comes in four variants: red (fire elemental), blue (water), white (air), emerald (earth).

granted_actions.name: Shatter Gem (Summon Elemental)
granted_actions.summary: Shatter to summon the appropriate elemental type. It obeys for 1 hour then departs.

items.description_summary: One of four colors. Shatter to summon an elemental (fire/water/air/earth) that serves you for 1 hour.

items.name: Keoghtom's Ointment

granted_actions.name: Apply Ointment
granted_actions.summary: Apply one dose: cures poison, restores 2d8+2 HP, and ends one disease. Item consumed when all doses used.

items.description_summary: 1d4+1 doses. Action: apply one dose to cure poison, restore 2d8+2 HP, end one disease. Item consumed when all doses are used.

items.name: Lantern of Revealing

passive_effects.summary: Invisible creatures and objects in the bright light of this lantern become visible.

items.description_summary: While lit, sheds bright light in 30 ft and dim in 30 ft beyond. All invisible creatures/objects in bright light are visible.

items.name: Oil of Slipperiness

granted_actions.name: Apply Oil
granted_actions.summary: Pour on floor (10-sq-ft area, 8 hrs) or on a creature (1 hr). Freedom of Movement effect.

items.description_summary: Pour on a 10-ft square (8 hours) or apply to a creature (1 hour). Effect mimics Freedom of Movement for creature, or extreme friction-loss for surface.

items.name: Pearl of Power

granted_actions.name: Recover Spell Slot
granted_actions.summary: Recover one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower. Once per dawn.

items.description_summary: 1/day: action to recover one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower.

items.name: Philter of Love

granted_actions.name: Drink Philter
granted_actions.summary: Drinker is charmed for 1 hour. Regards first creature seen after drinking as its true love.

items.description_summary: Creature that drinks is charmed for 1 hour, treating the first creature it sees as its true love.

items.name: Pipes of Haunting

granted_actions.name: Play Haunting Melody
granted_actions.summary: Creatures within 30 ft must DC 13 Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Play: creatures within 30 ft must DC 13 Wisdom save or be frightened for 1 minute. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.

items.name: Pipes of the Sewers

granted_actions.name: Summon Rat Swarms
granted_actions.summary: Summon 1d3 swarms of rats within 30 ft. They obey you while you play.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Play: summon 1d3 swarms of rats within 30 ft. Swarms obey while playing. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.

items.name: Potion of Fire Breath

granted_actions.name: Drink Potion
granted_actions.summary: For 1 hour: up to 3 times, bonus action to breathe fire in 30 ft cone (4d6 fire, DC 13 Dex half).

granted_actions.name: Exhale Fire
granted_actions.summary: 30-ft cone of fire: 4d6 fire damage, DC 13 Dexterity save for half.

items.description_summary: Drink: for 1 hour, can use bonus action up to 3 times to exhale fire in 30-ft cone (4d6 fire, DC 13 Dex save for half).

items.name: Rope of Climbing

passive_effects.summary: AC 20, 20 HP, holds up to 3,000 lbs. Animates on command.

granted_actions.name: Command Rope
granted_actions.summary: Rope climbs, coils, ties, or unties at up to 10 ft/round on your spoken command.

items.description_summary: 60-ft silk rope. Command word: rope animates, climbs or ties/unties itself (10 ft/round). AC 20, 20 HP, holds 3000 lbs.

items.name: Saddle of the Cavalier

passive_effects.summary: You cannot be involuntarily dismounted while conscious in this saddle.

items.description_summary: While in this saddle and conscious, you can't be dismounted against your will.

items.name: Sending Stones

granted_actions.name: Send Message
granted_actions.summary: Cast Sending to reach the holder of the paired stone. Once per dawn per stone.

items.description_summary: Matched pair. Each bearer may cast Sending (to the other bearer only) once per dawn.

items.name: Sentinel Shield
items.description_summary: Shield with a stylized eye. +2 AC, advantage on Perception and initiative.

items.name: Wand of Magic Detection

granted_actions.name: Detect Magic
granted_actions.summary: Cast Detect Magic (concentration, up to 10 minutes).

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Action: cast Detect Magic. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.

items.name: Wind Fan

granted_actions.name: Gust of Wind
granted_actions.summary: Cast Gust of Wind (60 ft line, concentration 1 min). 20% destruction if overused.

items.description_summary: 3 charges. Action: cast Gust of Wind. On 6+ charges used without recharge, 20% chance fan disappears. Regain 1d3 charges at dawn.

items.name: Winged Boots

passive_effects.summary: Flying speed equals your walking speed while attuned.
4 hour total flight. Recharges at 2 hours per hour rested. Disappears if flying speed already possessed.

granted_actions.name: Toggle Flight
granted_actions.summary: Start or stop flying. Flight speed equals walking speed. Uses flight duration charges.

items.description_summary: Attuned: fly speed equals walking speed. 4 hours total flight. Regain 2 hours of flight per hour of rest.
